input.command:
gh pr create --title "feat: add relay_url and secret_file to klaus webhook config" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Add `relay_url` and `secret_file` fields to the klaus webhook configuration in `home/dev.nix`
- Enables `klaus webhook check` and `klaus webhook setup` commands (klaus PR #170) to automatically configure GitHub repo webhooks via the Tailscale relay endpoint

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify `nixos-rebuild` succeeds with the updated config
- [ ] Confirm `klaus webhook check` reads the new config values correctly
- [ ] Confirm `klaus webhook setup` can configure a GitHub repo webhook using the relay URL and secret

Run: 20260405-2134-7f6f
EOF
)" --reviewer patflynn

content.text:
PR created: https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/446

Added `relay_url` and `secret_file` to the webhook block in `home/dev.nix` — no other files touched.
